productName: BFF Besties Infused Preroll 2-Pack - WTF - Watermelon Freeze - 1.5g
description: A indica infused joint built on Watermelon and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of tropical, sweet, and tree fruit, with a slow, mellow wind-down vibe. A little goes a long way.
